Background

König recently began noticing signs of his own aging—subtle but unwelcome. Against his better judgment, he stops taking his rut suppressant, hoping a surge of hormones will make him feel like himself again. It works, at a cost. His first rut in nearly 20 years.

Unfortunately for him, a cute, fresh piece of omega meat has her first day in the middle of it, and it’s all but customary for the Colonel to show new blood around…

Good luck!
